title: TOPReward: Token Probabilities as Hidden Zero-Shot Rewards for Robotics
summary: TOPReward introduces a zero-shot progress estimator for robotic manipulation by extracting task progress signals directly from the token probabilities of video Vision-Language Models (VLMs), requiring no reward-specific training. The method is evaluated on two benchmarks: Open X-Embodiment (780 episodes across 39 datasets) and the newly introduced ManiRewardBench (497 episodes across multiple robot platforms), demonstrating strong success detection and improved behavior cloning through reward-aligned training.
